content.full_text:
June 21, 2004

Michael P. Garvey
City of San Carlos
Post Office Box 3009
San Carlos, CA 94070-1309

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-132

Dear Mr. Garvey:

This letter confirms the receipt of your June 14, 2004, request for advice regarding San Carlos City Councilmember Matt Grocott and a potential conflict of interest. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations section 18329(b)(8)(B), unless Mr. Grocott has authorized you as his representative, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. I enclose a copy of regulation 18329 for your review.

If you believe a violation of the Political Reform Act has occurred, you may file the enclosed complaint form with our Enforcement Division.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

Enclosures
JWW:jg
